name: Arctic Minerals AB (publ)
summary: Arctic Minerals AB (publ), through its subsidiaries, engages in exploration and mining of mineral properties in the Norway and Sweden. The company explores for gold, copper, and zinc deposits. It primarily holds interests in Bidjovagge gold-copper project that covers a total of 9 extraction permits totaling 7.16 square kilometers at Bidjovagge, as well as 1 exploration permit covering 1 square kilometer located in Finnmark, Northern Norway. The company was formerly known as Arctic Gold AB (publ) and changed its name to Arctic Minerals AB (publ) in December 2017. Arctic Minerals AB (publ) was founded in 1999 and is based in √É¬ñstersund, Sweden.
